name_cn:
Factory leather with full packaging
Large Montaigne In stock!!️
Montaigne Denim series, got recommended this bag, reinterprets the classic letter pattern with irregular stonewash effects, giving the bag a brand new style, the gradient effect is unique and cool, denim print shows off fashion charm, looks both high-end and visually striking, moderate size, very suitable for daily outings, classic bag shape, iconic letter lock, paired with exquisite chain shoulder strap, modern and elegant, perfect fusion of retro and fashion
size: 25*16.5*8cm
